title: Looking at GUN?
author: Mission-Outside-2499
selftext:
Just saw GUN dump like 16%—thank god I was running it on BYDFI's demo trading. Took 10x long in the paper account, was up for a bit, now it's basically back to zero.

Honestly, if this was real money I'd probably be losing sleep right now. The good thing about demo is it doesn't hurt your wallet, but you still get that ""market humbles you"" feeling. Honestly, I'm starting to think practicing with fake money first is way more important than rushing into real trades.

Anyone else watching GUN? Is this just a pullback or a reversal? I'm gonna keep messing around in the demo for now until I feel more confident.
